case_title: OSCAR GUILLEN ET AL VS. LEYNER PARRA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY GUILLEN, OSCAR DUARTE, FLOR AS TO DEFENDANT PARRA, LEYNER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JUL-21-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PARRA, LEYNER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---VICTOR HERNANDEZ.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUILLEN, OSCAR DUARTE, FLOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARRA, LEYNER $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,270.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT OF $950.00 OF THE JUDGMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 28, 2015, DELIVER TO PLAINTIFFS THE PHOTO ALBUM OF PHOTOS TAKEN AT PLAINTIFFS DAUGHTER'S QUINCEANERA ON OCTOBER 19, 2013. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
- RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT
